sync.expired: Your session has expired. Please refresh to log in again.

generation.bannerLoadingSub: Can take a few minutes. We'll let you know

generate.heroSub: Tell us what you eat and we will generate a balanced 7-day meal plan in seconds.
generate.loadingSub: This can take a few minutes. You can keep using the app — we'll notify you the moment it's ready.

form.noProfileSub: Tip: {link} once and the AI will use it for every plan from now on.
form.fridgeLabel: What is in your fridge this week
form.fridgeHint: Optional. Helps the AI build a plan around what you already have.
form.fridgePlaceholder: chicken breast, broccoli, eggs, brown rice, greek yogurt…
form.extrasHint: Optional. Anything that only applies to this particular week.
form.extrasPlaceholder: having dinner out on Friday, want to try Thai food, low budget…

preview.title: Your generated week
preview.subtitle: {range} · 35 dishes
preview.warning: If the week already has dishes, you'll be asked whether to replace or append.

generate.warningsSub: The AI kept some forbidden items even after a retry. Review before applying.

applyChoice.title: This week already has a plan
applyChoice.body: Do you want to replace the existing dishes with the new plan, or keep both (add the new dishes on top)?
applyChoice.replaceHint: Deletes everything currently in this week
applyChoice.appendHint: Keeps old dishes and stacks the new ones

profile.title: Diet profile
profile.subtitle: Saved once and used every time the AI generates a plan, so you don't have to repeat yourself.
profile.goalsHint: You can pick more than one (e.g. gain muscle + maintain weight).
profile.allergiesAndIntolerancesPlaceholder: e.g. peanuts, shellfish, lactose intolerant, celiac
profile.notesPlaceholder: anything else worth knowing — e.g. I work out 4 times a week, I hate sandwiches for dinner…
profile.dislikedSub: The AI will never use these in new plans. Add ingredients here or with the trash icon next to any ingredient inside a dish.
profile.dislikedAddPlaceholder: Add an ingredient and press Enter

mealTypes.title: Meal types
mealTypes.subtitle: Customize names and default times of each meal

data.title: Data management
data.subtitle: Your data is synced to a private database tied to your account.
data.exportDesc: Download all your meal plans as a JSON backup file
data.importDesc: Restore from a previously exported backup file
data.translateDesc: Translate every existing dish to the language you currently use ({lang}). Only dishes that are missing this translation will be sent to the AI.
data.translateNothing: All dishes already have a {lang} translation.
data.clearDesc: Permanently delete all meal plans and settings
data.clearConfirm: Clear all diet data? This cannot be undone.

dishDetail.title: Dish details
dishDetail.noRecipe: No recipe details yet. Click Edit to add ingredients and instructions.

dishChat.intro: Ask anything about this dish or request a change. The AI knows the recipe and your diet profile.
dishChat.placeholder: e.g. swap chickpeas for lentils, can I make this gluten-free, why so many carbs…
dishChat.appliedSub: The new version is saved. Switch to the Recipe tab to see it.
dishChat.empty: No messages yet. Try one of the suggestions below.

shopping.title: Shopping list
shopping.subtitle: Everything you need to buy for the week's meal plan
shopping.empty: No shopping list yet. Generate a plan first and it will appear here.

errors.parseFailed: Failed to parse meal plan as JSON.
